subcodes.first_line: O servant of the one true God! In cycles gone by, although the signs of God’s power and the truth of His Cause were clear and manifest, yet to outward seeming the divine tests were severe
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در دورهای سابق آثار قدرت الهیه و حقیت امر هر چند واضح و باهر بود
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab
